puzzle.title: The Scorners of the Wind's Warning
puzzle.intro: A nation arose from the earth, blessed with immense strength and unmatched skill in construction. Their pride swelled with their accomplishments, causing them to dismiss the warnings of a messenger sent to guide them. Their story is a powerful reminder that no might on Earth can stand against the will of the Divine.
clues: We were made successors on the earth after a great flood had cleansed it.
We were known for our towering structures, the likes of which had not been created in the lands before.
A prophet from among our own people was sent to us, but we accused him of being a liar.
We boasted of our physical power, asking aloud, 'Who is mightier than us in strength?'
We arrogantly challenged our messenger to bring upon us the divine punishment he warned of.
Our end came as a furious, roaring wind that raged for seven nights and eight consecutive days, leaving us like hollow palm trunks.

trial.label: What Was Our Primary Sin?
options: Building a tower to reach the heavens
Plotting to kill a prophet in a well

outcome.label: What Was Our Punishment?
options: A shower of stones of baked clay

puzzle.arabic: فَأَمَّا عَادٌۭ فَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ بِغَيْرِ ٱلْحَقِّ وَقَالُوا۟ مَنْ أَشَدُّ مِنَّا قُوَّةً ۖ أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَهُمْ هُوَ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُمْ قُوَّةًۭ ۖ وَكَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا يَجْحَدُونَ
puzzle.verse: As for ʿAad, they were arrogant upon the earth without right and said, "Who is greater than us in strength?" Did they not consider that Allāh who created them was greater than them in strength? But they were rejecting Our signs. (41:15)
